reviews.review_description: I've had this game for a while. I never actually made a review. So i am now. This game is crazy. There's a lot of nice moderators unlike any game. Besides Gorilla tag. You can swim have abilities use game modes like only up. I like this game very much. I wish i could become a moderator and find and tell people to be nice to one a another.  you can download the game its free and full of actions and activities.

I love this game very much, i don't understand why i had previously uninstalled this game. There is so much to do, like hide and seek (which i think should be its own game mode), explore, mess around with friends, i could keep going but i don't want to make this too long. The only thing is, I'm not a fan of the new battle remake, sure its a cool idea, but it just doesn't feel as open or the same anymore. I'm sure many others have felt the same because there is barely anyone in that game mode anymore. But aside from that, this has got to be one of my favorite hangout games.
